name: Teriyaki Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a small container.
2. Stir until the sugar is fully dissolved.
3. When brushing onto foods, continuously swirl the mixture to keep it well combined.
4. Use this marinade for cut and pressed tofu, marinating for 1 hour; or for cubed tempeh or cubed seitan, marinating for 1 hour.
5. Alternatively, brush over grilled tomatoes.
